flashcards.definition: Soviet-era irrigation diversions caused one of the worst environmental disasters; Aral Sea lost ~90% volume.
World's largest hydroelectric dam on China's Yangtze River; enormous power but major social and environmental costs.
US Great Plains aquifer being drained for irrigation faster than recharge; threatens food production.
Minerals mined in conflict zones (coltan, tin, tungsten, gold) whose trade funds armed groups.
Paradox where countries rich in natural resources often have poor economic outcomes and governance.
